DSRESOURCES.NoCharacter: No character assigned. Please select a character in Player Configuration.
DSRESOURCES.NoCharacterGM: No player characters found. Players need to assign characters in Player Configuration.
DSRESOURCES.NoClassData: No resource rules found for this class yet.

Surge.Description: Surges are a shared party resource. Heroes gain surges through various abilities and events. Spending surges can enhance abilities, add extra damage, or trigger special effects.

HeroToken.ComingSoon: Hero Token tracking will be available in a future version.
